$schema_note: Machine-readable bibliography for EM-Tracking-Definitive-Guide. Every entry must be verifiable. 'verified' = checked against an authoritative index (IEEE Xplore, PubMed, DOI resolver, patent office) during research. Fields: id, type, title, authors, year, venue, volume, issue, pages, doi, url, publisher, source_type, keywords, relevance, confidence, notes, verified.

entries.title: Magnetic Position and Orientation Tracking System
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
entries.notes: Seminal formalization of quasi-static magnetic-dipole 6-DOF tracking. DOI inferred from IEEE TAES AES-15(5); page range 709-718 confirmed via multiple indexes.

entries.title: Electromagnetic Tracking in Medicine—A Review of Technology, Validation, and Applications
entries.notes: The definitive modern review of medical EMT. DOI and citation verified via PubMed/dblp.

entries.title: Design and application of an assessment protocol for electromagnetic tracking systems
entries.notes: Standardized phantom/protocol for comparable EMT accuracy assessment. DOI verified. Volume/issue/pages to re-confirm against Wiley record.

entries.title: A Novel Method for Nonfluoroscopic Catheter-Based Electroanatomical Mapping of the Heart: In Vitro and In Vivo Accuracy Results
entries.notes: Foundational clinical paper underlying the Biosense CARTO system. PMID 9118532 verified.

entries.title: Our Technology — AC Electromagnetic Tracking
entries.notes: Vendor self-description of AC electromagnetic tracking; used only for vendor-attributed claims. Access year approximate; treat as living document.
